ab: Kuras, ungac da sinaw sapah, usa marig sinaw.
ch: W:Kuras，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Kuras, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: Niqan kingal tasaw na hpuyan , iya barig han!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: Uxay baka ka kingal tasaw, usa marig dha tasaw dungan.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Marig ku sinaw, niqan namu sinaw sbarig hug?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: Niqan wah! Marig su piya?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: Marig ku dha tasaw, marig ku kingal lubuy buwax uri.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Nii ka buwax, marig su manu na hug?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: Marig ku balung na, niqan namu hug?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: Wada brigan kana da balung nami.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: Marig ku lukus.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Mkmarig su meenu na hug?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: Marig ku putuh usuk lukus.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: Hmuya ka embanah nii?
en: How about this red one?

ab: Niqan ka ini ktna na rakaw?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: Niqan nami embhgay ni mgkarac na.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: Biqi ku kingal lukus mgkanac na.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Kuras, mnusa su inu ka sayang balay hug? Mnusa su yun-tung hug?
ch: W:Kuras你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Kuras, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Ini! Mnusa ku dmayaw marig damac bubu rudan.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: Kiya ? Niqan jiyax su keeman? Aguh seupu knan mkan nhapuy hug?
ch: W:這樣啊？你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯？
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Uxay! Musa ku marig lukus.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Tuhuy ku sunan musa.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: Embiyax su hug? Piya pila ka bnkiyan sama nii?
ch: M:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: kingal bnkiyan o empusal pila.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: Piya pila ka bunga nii?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: Kingal tay-cin o mtrul pila.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: Biqi ku dha bnkiyan sama ni kingal tay-cin bunga.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
